# Documentation

## Pingcentral 3.1.1

- [Accessing PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_accessing/pingcentral_accessing_pc.md): Instructions for accessing PingCentral.
- [Adding applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingentral_adding_apps/pingcentral_adding_apps.md): Instructions for adding applications to PingCentral.
- [Configuring logging](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_logging.md): Instructions for configuring logging for PingCentral.
- [Configuring MTLS](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_config_mtls.md): Instructions for importing a client TLS key pair so that you can use MTLS for admin API authentication.
- [Configuring PingAccess for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pa_sso.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral to use SSO to access PingAccess.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Linux systemd service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_linux_systemd.md): Instructions for running PingCentral as a Linux systemd service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Linux systemv service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_linux_systemv.md): Instructions for running PingCentral as a Linux systemv service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Windows service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_windows.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral to run as a Windows service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run in FIPS-compliant mode](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_fips_mode.md): Instructions on configuring PingCentral to run in FIPS-compliant mode.
- [Configuring PingFederate and PingAccess for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pf_pa_sso.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral, PingFederate, and PingAccess for SSO.
- [Configuring PingFederate as a PingAccess token provider](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_pf_as_pa_token/pingcentral_configuring_pf_token_provider.md): This topic explains how to configure PingFederate as the PingAccess token provider.
- [Configuring PingFederate for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pf_sso.md)
- [Creating and testing approval expressions](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_approval_expressions/pingcentral_create_test_expressions.md): Instructions for creating and testing Spring Expression Language (SpEL) expressions, and provide OAuth and SAML SP approval examples.
- [Installing and configuring PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_install_config.md): This page contains links to instructions for installing and configuring PingCentral.
- [Installing PingCentral on Linux systems](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_installing_pc_linux.md): Instructions for installing PingCentral on Linux systems.
- [Installing PingCentral on Microsoft Windows](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_installing_pc_windows.md): Instructions for installing PingCentral on Microsoft Windows.
- [Introduction to PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_intro/pingcentral_ao_intro.md): An introduction to PingCentral and a high-level explanation of how it works.
- [Introduction to PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_intro/pingcentral_intro.md): An introduction to PingCentral and a high-level explanation of how it works.
- [Managing applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_managing_apps/pingcentral_managing_apps.md): Instructions for managing applications within PingCentral.
- [Managing applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_applications/pingcentral_manage_apps.md): Instructions for managing PingCentral applications.
- [Managing approvals (administrators)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_approvals/pingcentral_manage_approvals.md): Instructions for managing application approvals.
- [Managing approvals (application owners)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_manage_approvals/pingcentral_app_owner_manage_approvals.md): Instructions for monitoring approval requests and promoting approved applications.
- [Managing environments](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_environments/pingcentral_mng_environments.md): Instructions for adding,updating, and deleting environments.
- [Managing templates](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_templates/pingcentral_mng_templates.md): Instructions for managing OAuth, OIDC, and SAML application templates.
- [Managing user groups](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_user_groups/pingcentral_managing_groups.md): This section explains how to add, update, and delete user groups.
- [Managing users](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_users/pingcentral_mng_users.md): Instructions for managing your users, either directly through the PingCentral application, or by setting up SSO.
- [Monitoring PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_monitoring/pingcentral_monitoring_pc.md): Information about the Spring Boot Actuator and how you can use it to monitor PingCentral.
- [PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_iam_home.md)
- [PingCentral 1.10 (June 2022)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_june2022.md): PingCentral release notes, June 2022
- [PingCentral 1.11 (March 2023)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_march2023.md): PingCentral release notes, March 2023
- [PingCentral 1.12 (June 2023)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_june2023.md): PingCentral release notes, June 2023
- [PingCentral 1.13](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_version_113.md): PingCentral 1.13 was skipped.
- [PingCentral 1.14 (September 2023)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_sept2023.md): PingCentral release notes, September 2023
- [PingCentral 1.14.1 (November 2023)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_nov2023.md): PingCentral release notes, November 2023
- [PingCentral 2.0 (December 2023)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_dec2023.md)
- [PingCentral 2.0.1 (January 2024)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_jan2024.md): PingCentral release notes, January 2024
- [PingCentral 2.0.2 (April 2024)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_april2024.md): PingCentral release notes, April 2024
- [PingCentral 2.1 (June 2024)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_june2024.md)
- [PingCentral 2.2 (December 2024)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_dec2024.md): PingCentral release notes, December 2024
- [PingCentral 2.3 (April 2025)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_april2025.md): PingCentral release notes, April 2025
- [PingCentral 3.0 (November 2025)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_nov2025.md)
- [PingCentral 3.0.1 (March 2026)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_march_2026.md)
- [PingCentral 3.1 (April 2026)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_april2026.md): PingCentral release notes, March 2026
- [PingCentral 3.1.1 (May 2026)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_may2026.md): PingCentral release notes, January 2024
- [PingCentral licensing](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_licensing.md): Instructions for viewing PingCentral licensing information.
- [Previous Releases](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_prev_relnotes.md): PingCentral release notes for 2022 and earlier
- [Promoting applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_promoting_apps/pingcentral_promoting_apps.md): Instructions for promoting OAuth, OIDC, SAML, and PingAccess applications.
- [Promotion processes](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_promotion_processes/pingcentral_promotion_processes.md): Instructions for promoting OAuth, OIDC, and PingAccess applications, and reverting promotions, if necessary.
- [Release Notes](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/release_notes/pingcentral_relnotes_home.md): The home page for PingCentral release notes.
- [Replacing the admin console SSL certificate](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_admin_ssl_cert.md): Instructions on replacing the admin console SSL certificate.
- [Reverting applications to previously promoted versions](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingdirectory_revert_apps/pingcentral_revert_ao_apps.md): Instructions for reverting applications to previously promoted versions.
- [Setting up MySQL](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_mysql.md): Instructions for installing the MySQL connector and configure it to communicate with PingCentral.
- [System requirements and supported configurations](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_system_requirements/pingcentral_system_requirements.md): Information about the system requirements and configurations supported in this version of PingCentral.
- [Updating applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_updating_apps/pingcentral_ao_updating_apps.md): Instructions for updating PingCentral applications.
- [Upgrading PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_upgrading/pingcentral_upgrading_pc.md): Instructions on upgrading PingCentral to the next version.
- [Using Docker to deploy PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_docker.md): Instructions for using Docker to deploy PingCentral.
- [Viewing application information](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_viewing_apps/pingcentral_viewing_apps.md): Instructions for viewing application information.

## Pingcentral 3.0

- [Accessing PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_accessing/pingcentral_accessing_pc.md): Instructions for accessing PingCentral.
- [Adding applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingentral_adding_apps/pingcentral_adding_apps.md): Instructions for adding applications to PingCentral.
- [Configuring logging](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_logging.md): Instructions for configuring logging for PingCentral.
- [Configuring MTLS](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_config_mtls.md): Instructions for importing a client TLS key pair so that you can use MTLS for admin API authentication.
- [Configuring PingAccess for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pa_sso.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral to use SSO to access PingAccess.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Linux systemd service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_linux_systemd.md): Instructions for running PingCentral as a Linux systemd service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Linux systemv service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_linux_systemv.md): Instructions for running PingCentral as a Linux systemv service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Windows service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_windows.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral to run as a Windows service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run in FIPS-compliant mode](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_fips_mode.md): Instructions on configuring PingCentral to run in FIPS-compliant mode.
- [Configuring PingFederate and PingAccess for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pf_pa_sso.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral, PingFederate, and PingAccess for SSO.
- [Configuring PingFederate as a PingAccess token provider](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_pf_as_pa_token/pingcentral_configuring_pf_token_provider.md): This topic explains how to configure PingFederate as the PingAccess token provider.
- [Configuring PingFederate for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pf_sso.md)
- [Creating and testing approval expressions](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_approval_expressions/pingcentral_create_test_expressions.md): Instructions for creating and testing Spring Expression Language (SpEL) expressions, and provide OAuth and SAML SP approval examples.
- [Installing and configuring PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_install_config.md): This page contains links to instructions for installing and configuring PingCentral.
- [Installing PingCentral on Linux systems](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_installing_pc_linux.md): Instructions for installing PingCentral on Linux systems.
- [Installing PingCentral on Microsoft Windows](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_installing_pc_windows.md): Instructions for installing PingCentral on Microsoft Windows.
- [Introduction to PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_intro/pingcentral_ao_intro.md): An introduction to PingCentral and a high-level explanation of how it works.
- [Introduction to PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_intro/pingcentral_intro.md): An introduction to PingCentral and a high-level explanation of how it works.
- [Managing applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_managing_apps/pingcentral_managing_apps.md): Instructions for managing applications within PingCentral.
- [Managing applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_applications/pingcentral_manage_apps.md): Instructions for managing PingCentral applications.
- [Managing approvals (administrators)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_approvals/pingcentral_manage_approvals.md): Instructions for managing application approvals.
- [Managing approvals (application owners)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_manage_approvals/pingcentral_app_owner_manage_approvals.md): Instructions for monitoring approval requests and promoting approved applications.
- [Managing environments](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_environments/pingcentral_mng_environments.md): Instructions for adding,updating, and deleting environments.
- [Managing templates](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_templates/pingcentral_mng_templates.md): Instructions for managing OAuth, OIDC, and SAML application templates.
- [Managing user groups](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_user_groups/pingcentral_managing_groups.md): This section explains how to add, update, and delete user groups.
- [Managing users](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_mng_users/pingcentral_mng_users.md): Instructions for managing your users, either directly through the PingCentral application, or by setting up SSO.
- [Monitoring PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_monitoring/pingcentral_monitoring_pc.md): Information about the Spring Boot Actuator and how you can use it to monitor PingCentral.

- [System requirements and supported configurations](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_system_requirements/pingcentral_system_requirements.md): Information about the system requirements and configurations supported in this version of PingCentral.

- [Upgrading PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_upgrading/pingcentral_upgrading_pc.md): Instructions on upgrading PingCentral to the next version.
- [Using Docker to deploy PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_docker.md): Instructions for using Docker to deploy PingCentral.
- [Viewing application information](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_viewing_apps/pingcentral_viewing_apps.md): Instructions for viewing application information.

## Pingcentral 2.3

- [Accessing PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingcentral_accessing/pingcentral_accessing_pc.md): Instructions for accessing PingCentral.
- [Adding applications](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_application_owners/pingentral_adding_apps/pingcentral_adding_apps.md): Instructions for adding applications to PingCentral.
- [Configuring logging](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_logging.md): Instructions for configuring logging for PingCentral.
- [Configuring MTLS](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_config_mtls.md): Instructions for importing a client TLS key pair so that you can use MTLS for admin API authentication.
- [Configuring PingAccess for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pa_sso.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral to use SSO to access PingAccess.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Linux systemd service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_linux_systemd.md): Instructions for running PingCentral as a Linux systemd service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Linux systemv service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_linux_systemv.md): Instructions for running PingCentral as a Linux systemv service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run as a Windows service](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_conf_pc_windows.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral to run as a Windows service.
- [Configuring PingCentral to run in FIPS-compliant mode](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_fips_mode.md): Instructions on configuring PingCentral to run in FIPS-compliant mode.
- [Configuring PingFederate and PingAccess for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pf_pa_sso.md): Instructions for configuring PingCentral, PingFederate, and PingAccess for SSO.
- [Configuring PingFederate as a PingAccess token provider](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_pf_as_pa_token/pingcentral_configuring_pf_token_provider.md): This topic explains how to configure PingFederate as the PingAccess token provider.
- [Configuring PingFederate for SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_pf_sso.md)

- [Installing and configuring PingCentral](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingcentral/3.1.1/pingcentral_for_iam_administrators/pingcentral_installing_configuring/pingcentral_install_config.md): This page contains links to instructions for installing and configuring PingCentral.
